name: mad-scientist-skills
description: C4 architecture diagrams, cognitive interface auditing, two-tier security auditing, two-tier observability auditing (beta), optimization auditing, and pre-commit quality gate for Claude Code

plugins.name: mad-scientist-skills
plugins.description: C4 architecture diagrams (Structurizr DSL), cognitive interface auditing (GOMS task models, Norman's Gulfs, Wood 7-layer error tolerance, Gergle visual grounding, NASA-TLX cognitive load, Dual-Process Theory, Cleveland & McGill visual encoding, Trust Calibration, Information Foraging, Gestalt principles, Ecological Interface Design, accessibility), two-tier security auditing (STRIDE, OWASP Top 10, web headers, API security, auth/session, supply chain), two-tier observability auditing (beta: instrumentation, logging, metrics, tracing, pipeline/ML monitoring, alerting, SLIs/SLOs), optimization auditing (algorithm efficiency, database queries, caching, concurrency, pipelines, distributed execution, cloud cost, profiling), and pre-commit quality gate with architecture diagram generation
